rubric_breakdown.feedback: Correctly selected multiplication or division in most problems.
Arithmetic is mostly right, with one denominator error.
Answers include clear units and match the story context.

feedback: Your explanations connect the numbers back to the story, which is a real strength. The main calculation issue is keeping common denominators straight when combining fractional amounts. Before finalizing an answer, rewrite both fractions with the same denominator and check that the unit still matches the question.
